programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are sick of their husbands dressing like slobs when they go out together in the evenings. After one particular outing, the girls get fed up and give their old clothes to a second-hand store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets another shot at being a star when a talent scout for the movies comes to town. Casting for the production agrees to audition Lucy after she gives him an impromptu performance of "There's No Business Like Show Business" with the Mertzes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A magazine test has gotten Lucy into a tizzy. Lucy and Ricky take a test called "How to Rate Your Marriage." One of the questions in the quiz asks about old flames. When Lucy rattles off a list of old boyfriends, Ricky feels the need to compare.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Out of money, and in need of a million dollar idea, Lucy goes into the business of selling salad dressing. Marketing her salad dressing on TV, Lucy elicits Ethel's help with the advertisement.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays the dominant parent role in their son's life. Realizing that he needs to spend more time with his son, Ricky agrees to spend his vacation at home to care for little Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are hosting an evening with friends. When the last guest to arrive introduces his date—all the men at the party fawn over her. Disgusted by the men's behavior, Lucy and Ethel begin to doubt their own feminine wiles.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky's thirteenth anniversary is rapidly approaching. In an outward show of affection, they buy each other gifts—golf clubs for Ricky and fur for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are being interviewed for a "day-in-the-life" magazine article on happy married couples. The interviewer arrives at 7 AM just in time to encounter Lucy making breakfast in a frilly lace apron, while Ricky walks in wearing a smoking jacket.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge of a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky scoffs at his wife and Ethel when they adamantly participate in the hunt for the "Bonus Buck" that will win them prize money from a newspaper contest. Later, Ricky discovers one of the lucky bucks in his own wallet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In an attempt to compete with her wealthy friends, Lucy pledges $500 (that she doesn't have) to charity. Luckily, Ethel spots an ad in Billboard magazine willing to pay $500 to anyone willing to perform a stunt to publicize a new movie, Women From Mars.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.desc: Lucy's mother writes to ask if she and her husband "Xavier" would be so kind as to entertain "a friend's roommate's cousin's middle boy, Ernest" when he visits New York.

programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives' murder case involving a high-powered studio executive leads them to Hollywood; back East, Ross learns the suspect has hired her ex-husband.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder victim's ex-husband enters rehab just as police are about to arrest him; McCoy butts heads with a judge in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Law clerks discover a tape that incriminates a new suspect; Ross tricks her ex-husband into discussing a plea.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to return a parolee to prison when he believes the serial rapist committed a murder after his early release.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to sidestep a plea bargain he made with a dangerous suspect in order to see justice done.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After being a suspect himself, a key witness becomes uncooperative with prosecutors when his wedding is ruined by his arrest.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross must sort it out when the death of an editor points to a scorned girlfriend but might be a cover-up.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a former cover girl leads detectives to unearth secrets the woman was desperately trying to hide.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Probing an anti-Semitic shooting spree at a posh fund-raiser, Briscoe and Curtis unearth more-personal motives.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A delivery man's route leads detectives to his killers; prosecutors try to strike a deal when a confession is protected in the name of religion.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives follow the trail of a stolen credit card to locate two teens they suspect may have killed their newborn baby.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis crack a killing ring during the investigation of a Navy officer's murder; McCoy and Ross fight for prosecution authority.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Prosecutors question a gunman's culpability when a medical report on the victim of a drive-by shooting raises suspicions about a doctor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A deadly robbery leads to a suburban militia; McCoy questions his safety when he faces the group leader in court.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teen model's death leads Briscoe and Curtis to her parents in Baltimore; there they enlist detectives Munch and Falsone. (Concluding on "Homicide: Life on the Street.")

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a new mother's death and the disappearance of her baby, leading prosecutors to probe the husband's role in the affair.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para un día de diversión! Desde cantar con globos hasta imitar sonidos de animales, canciones infantiles, partes del cuerpo, citas con el abuelo, sueños de dinosaurios y confiar en el médico, ¡es un día de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un viaje lleno de diversión en el que aprenderás a compartir, lo que potenciará la empatía y el sentimiento de cuidado hacia los demás.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en las encantadoras melodías que inspiran dulces sueños y sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de aventuras! Desde armar un puesto de limonadas hasta convertirse en princesas, explorar con la araña Itsy Bitsy y disfrutar de fiestas en pijama, ¡cada momento es mágico!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras! Desde tomar turnos hasta descubrir el cuerpo, las rutinas antes de dormir, superar enfermedades, la seguridad en la nieve y la diversión en Londres, ¡cada momento trae alegría y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un viaje de coraje y valentía, en el que aprenderán a enfrentarse a nuevos retos con una sonrisa y con confianza.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this visually stunning film has an contributions by Bono, Eric Clapton, Bruce Willis, Bonnie Raitt, Dr. John and Keith Richards, as well as appearances by Mick Jagger and President Obama.

programme.title: ABBA: Super Troupe
programme.desc: Few bands have been able to dominate the industry in the same way as ABBA. Follow their journey to celebrity stardom, through archival interviews and performances from ABBA, with added inside knowledge from leading industry professionals.

programme.title: Beach Boys: Doin' It Again
programme.desc: To mark the group's 50th anniversary, Brian Wilson, Mike Love, Al Jardine, Bruce Johnston, and David Marks gathered in 2012 for an emotional reunion to record their first album of new material in 20 years and to kick off a worldwide tour.

programme.title: Becoming Queen
programme.desc: Led by the incomparable voice and showmanship of Freddie Mercury, Queen pioneered a unique brand of operatic rock that perfectly encapsulated the decadent excess of the 1970s. This documentary traces the history of the band.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Everlasting Words
programme.desc: These three brothers rose to the top of their profession. Writing all of their own hits, the harmonious family act became one of the world's best-selling artists of all time, selling over more than 220 million records worldwide.

programme.title: Bowie: The Man Who Changed The World
programme.desc: An inside look at David Bowie, one of the most creative and influential rock artists of all time. Featuring exclusive contributions from those who worked with David Bowie and archive interviews with the man himself.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Bowie; Iggy & Lou; The Sacred Triangle: 1971- 1973
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: The Sacred Triangle. By 1971, Bowie was branded a one-hit-wonder; Reed was considered washed up and Iggy Pop was seen as a drug crazed ex-Stooge. But a meeting of minds was the catalyst for a turnaround for these three geniuses.

programme.title: Ozzy Osbourne: Throne of Darkness
programme.desc: The Prince of Darkness. Ozzy Osbourne. He is the physical embodiment of Rock and Roll.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Hemingway Papers
programme.desc: The legendary last manuscript of the great Ernest Hemingway tells of a buried treasure on an island far away… and thief extraordinaire Lupin is on the trail! But he gets caught up in a local civil war, Lupin will have to keep his wits or risk his life!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Napoleon's Dictionary
programme.desc: Lupin learns of his grandfather's secret treasure, supposedly hidden in the pages of a dictionary previously owned by Napoleon Bonaparte! Said dictionary just happens to be the prize in a cross-country classic car race.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: From Siberia With Love
programme.desc: Ultimate thief Lupin III has a new target: the lost gold of the Romanov dynasty! With the help of a mysterious blonde named Judy Scott, Lupin discovers the treasure hidden in Texas, at the Bank of Liberty.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's been a long time since Jigen, Goemon and Fujiko have heard from Lupin. Then one day, they each receive an invitation from Lupin for a reunion aboard the luxury liner Sirloin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An international soccer game is taking place in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil and Lupin has his eyes on the box office and betting takes. Will the box office heist go as planned?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An old man who supposedly knows the secret to Hitler's legacy lives in East Germany within the Berlin Wall. Lupin and his gang track the old man down, but the old man can't recall anything about any legacy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: At Loch Ness in Scotland, the mysterious monster Nessie reveals itself from the lake, charmed by Fujiko's singing. Seeing this, Doctor Oz decides to use Fujiko to capture Nessie for his personal gain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko and a mystery man have an enticing job for Lupin: Stealing a ton of gold bullion from a Swiss Bank, a bank renowned for its tight security. Can it be done? What is the mystery man's true identity?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A man is threatening to destroy the Leaning Tower of Pisa with a device that generates artificial earthquakes. The Italian government has no choice but to meet the culprit's, but Lupin takes the ransom for himself!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.desc: King Friday recites his kingly version of Twinkle Twinkle Little Star as Prince Tuesday struggles to write a poem of his own. Mrs. McFeely is watching a litter of sixteen-day-old puppies and explains the care that they need.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their new ship completed, Luffy and the gang get ready to set sail, but first, they’ll have to steal some underpants in order to secure the services of a shipwright!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A series of flashbacks to his younger days – and some painful persuasion by Robin – help Franky make the difficult decision to leave his friends and go to sea with the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats are ready for their next adventure, but before they can move on they must await the return of Usopp – and avoid a barrage of cannonballs courtesy of Garp!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ new ship gets a name, and Franky shows off some of its special features as the gang goes sky high to avoid being sunk by the marines!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Blackbeard go toe-to-toe in an epic clash of Devil Fruit powers that pits fire against darkness – and threatens to destroy an entire island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates cross paths with a ragged gang of sailors. The Straw Hats are quick to offer assistance, but their new friends may be up to no good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats discover that their fishermen friends are actually pirates, but Chopper refuses to abandon a very sick patient.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The captain of the Phoenix Pirates loses his will to fight, and the Straw Hats get trapped in a field of icebergs by some figure skating bounty hunters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and Franky take a spin in the shark sub, Usopp and Sanji have a run in with a flock of deadly penguins, and Puzzle can no longer hide the fact that he's alive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin is shocked by her encounter with an adorable bounty hunter, Franky and Nami get trapped in a frozen shark, and Luffy's quest to recapture his flag sends him sinking toward the bottom of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles a set of magnetic twins, Sanji and Usopp fall victim to a pair of figure skating lovebirds, and Zoro has a drink with the man who stole the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin's cola care package helps spring her friends from an icy prison, and Luffy's bold words inspire a battered and beaten pirate to keep fighting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his battle with the magnetic twins, Chopper uses a rumble ball in his battle with a hockey player – and Robin tries to recover the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles an opponent who's too hot to handle, Robin gets attacked by a jungle, and Chopper makes a heroic dash for the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's red-hot battle with Papa threatens to destroy the entire icy island, and the rest of the Straw Hats need a little help from a former enemy to recover their flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The most adorable hero the world has ever known – Chopperman – must battle a hideously evil villain to regain control of his favorite television station!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While sailing through haunted waters, the Straw Hats encounter a ghost ship that's home to a walking, talking skeleton!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats attempt to unravel the mystery of their new comrade, but the skeleton's sad story is interrupted by a ghastly landing at the haunted island of Thriller Bark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting stranded at Thriller Bark, Chopper, Nami, and Usopp are chased by a three headed beast. Back on the boat, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats are terrorized by an unseen enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Nami, and Usopp get scared out of their minds when they encounter a graveyard full of zombies! Meanwhile, the rest of the crew gets trapped in super creepy sea web!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An invisible man turns Nami's bath time into a harrowing experience, and Usopp battles a hall full of haunted paintings with a handful of burning candles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Usopp, Nami, and Chopper seek to unravel the secrets of the haunted mansion, Luffy and the gang do battle with an army of the undead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets his sights on the shadowing-stealing monster known as Gecko Moria, and the zombie army prepares for a night attack led by their perverted, invisible leader!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp, Chopper, and Nami get trapped in a coffin after being slashed by a zombie samurai. Meanwhile, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats make short work of some haunted paintings!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After escaping from their coffin prison, Usopp, Chopper, and Nami do battle with a garden full of adorably dead zombie animals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An undead warthog sets her sights on Nami, Zorro and Sanji vanish without a trace, Franky and Robin battle an unbeatable army, and Luffy gets captured!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A penguin zombie starts acting an awful lot like Sanji, Nami continues running for her life, and Robin and Franky buy some time by blowing up a bridge!

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A young artist with an uncanny ability to draw remarkably detailed pictures from memory may be the key to solving a case surrounding the suspicious death of his abusive father.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and Will (ROBIN DUNNE) investigate a distressing call for help deep below the Bermuda Triangle resulting in a deadly battle to save Magnus's life.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will (ROBIN DUNNE) finds himself caught in an underground fight club where the combatants are genetically engineered abnormals who fight to the death like modern-day gladiators.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and the Sanctuary team attempt to capture a rare and deadly creature - all under the watchful eye of a local news crew.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Lili (Lisa Howard) are summoned to the small Amish town of Paradise to investigate the mysterious deaths of several of its citizens.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen) comes out from hiding, launching a media attack against the Taelons, leaving Boone (Kevin Kilner) to deal with the ramifications.

programme.desc: When Lili's (Lisa Howard) shuttle is stolen by a friend whose space mission to Mars has been canceled by the Taelons, Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Augur (Richard Chevolleau) end up helping him complete his expedition.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A community bands together to search for a missing woman; police are unable to solve the case until they speak to her husband's close friend and learn some startling information.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lover; Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Police searching for the killer of a beloved grandfather find the murderer close to home wielding a shocking weapon.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A young woman is killed in her bedroom, and the evidence appears to point to a clear suspect, but it takes 30 years and new evidence to reveal a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A glamorous 85-year-old millionaire is found stabbed in her basement, sending police on an international investigation that unearths devilish secrets, double lives and a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a beloved elderly woman is viciously murdered, detectives discover a chilling connection to another unsolved murder; the trail points to someone from her past and investigators race to hunt the killer down before they can strike again.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After the burned body of a young nursing student is discovered near a rural road, detectives investigate several suspects until the trail of evidence unearths a disturbing and predatory plot.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When an athletic and popular college student is violently murdered in her apartment, police track down several surprising suspects, including one with a disturbing obsession, before crucial evidence unmasks a dangerous predator no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A fun-loving 59-year-old man is found shot to death in his home and his beloved jewelry collection has been stolen, leading detectives to a long list of suspects and a killer harboring a dark secret.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A restaurant is robbed and the night manager murdered, leading police to investigate suspicious co-workers, a disgruntled ex-employee and a violent serial attacker.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Detectives investigate a secret affair, a kidnapping plot and a racist gang when a young husband-to-be is found shot and stabbed.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a devoted mother is stabbed to death in a horrifying attack, suspicion falls on those closest to her; a cryptic note and a violent crime spree baffle detectives at first, but they eventually track down a deranged killer no one predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A vibrant young mother of three is murdered in the safety of her own home and investigators look to a history of troubled romances, but when the case goes cold and police can't find the killer, a phone call leads to a culprit hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: An assassination, a bitter custody dispute and a gunman's cryptic words send police scrambling on an interstate hunt to find the killer of a beloved father and husband.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When the strangling death of a young mother and bride-to-be baffles police, detectives probe a workplace grievance in search of a killer, before a cherished possession provides a link to the crime and cracks the case wide open.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished - even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While trying to secure a new home, Rick and his group face challenges, and question the utopia they find themselves in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When life within the walls begins to mimic life outside, the group realizes that sheltered life may not be possible.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others have a difficult time assimilating into Alexandria; a new threat arises that could bring the group closer together.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When it appears that things are starting to normalize in the settlement, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to begin pulling itself back together; peace is embraced between the two groups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria again with a threat that may be too big to defeat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Now that walkers have shown up inside the gates of Alexandria, Rick and the other survivors are scared and outnumbered.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A simple scavenging run proves to be more tricky, when the survivors are not the only ones after a goldmine of supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After realizing that Alexandria may not be as safe as he originally thought, Rick must make decisions about where to go.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, ahora en el cuartel general de los Salvadores, tiene que demostrar a Negan que vale la pena mantenerlo vivo. Mientras, Dwight es culpado de que Sherry haya permitido la fuga de Darryl y Negan le da una última oportunidad: encontrar a Sherry.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick busca provisiones y armas con las que contentar a sus nuevos aliados en la lucha contra Negan. Mientras, Rosita está cada vez más impaciente por comenzar la guerra y en Alexandria, Tara deberá tomar una decisión trascendental.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores acuden a un encuentro con habitantes del Reino para llevarse los suministros que les cobran a cambio de protección, pero algo sucede y las cosas no marchan tal y como deberían.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores visitan Hilltop inesperadamente, sorprendiendo a todo el mundo, y su intención va más allá de la de cobrar el pago de suministros. Además, Rosita y Sasha se dirigen al campamento de los Salvadores con la intención de asesinar a Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick lleva a cabo una peligrosa misión para obtener armas de la comunidad de mujeres en la que estuvo Tara, quieran ellas o no cooperar. Además, Negan mantiene cautiva a Sasha.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La batalla final contra los Salvadores se aproxima, mientras Sasha se encuentra a merced de Negan y Dwight trata de demostrar a Rick que ha sido sincero con ellos y quiere ver a Negan muerto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo, junto con los del Reino y Hilltop, están preparados para comenzar la lucha contra Negan y los Salvadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los aliados de Alexandria atacan a la vez diferentes guaridas de los Saviors, pero estos los superan en número y armamento y la batalla va a ser intensa, cruel y no exenta de bajas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con Rick contra las cuerdas, la guerra contra los Saviors se recrudece y Hilltop, el Reino y Alexandria conocen el verdadero potencial del ejército de Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Saviors poseen un arma de gran potencia que pretenden transportar para ayudar a Negan. Ezekiel, que ha sobrevivido a la matanza de sus hombres, y Carol, aislada en territorio enemigo, son los únicos que pueden impedir la entrega del arma.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gabriel y Negan tienen que cooperar para salir con vida de la casa en la que están encerrados, con decenas de muertos vivientes tratando de comérselos. Mientras, los lugartenientes de Negan se dan cuenta de que uno de ellos es un traidor, ¿quién?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick visita a Jadis para convencerla de que se una a ellos en la lucha contra Negan. En Hilltop, Gregory sugiere a Maggie, que está enojada con Jesus porque está alimentando a los prisioneros, que los ahorque. Carl se encuentra con Siddiq.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Tara rompen el muro del Santuario y los zombis entran al recinto. Negan exige a Eugene que idee una manera de sacarlos con vida de allí. Jadis prepara a Rick una muerte horrenda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan y sus hombres atacan a las tres comunidades rebeldes al mismo tiempo. Sin Rick, Carl asume la defensa de Alexandria, cercada por el propio Negan. Mientras, Simon detiene al ejército de Hilltop en la carretera y Gavin quiere capturar a Ezekiel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl hace una última petición a Rick y Michonne antes de morir. Mientras tanto, Morgan y Carol intentan rescatar a Ezekiel antes de que Gavin se lo entregue vivo a Negan para que este lo torture y asesine delante de sus seguidores.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon become involved in a bizarre Siberian prisoner exchange in Vladivostok without leaving the United States.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter a society lady who plans to change the U.S.A. into a monarchy and reign as its queen.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The receipt of a newspaper that predicts the death, in their presence, of a famed magician, puzzles agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon investigate the murder of a scientist who had been studying a rash of destructive tidal waves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon Again tangle with pint-sized Dr. Loveless, who has another king-sized plan to achieve world conquest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fear an attempt on President Grant's life while they are escorting him to a San Francisco conference.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Artemus Gordon are summoned to a meeting of Navy officers, only to discover that they have all been murdered.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A master criminal determines to implant a device in President Grant's brain that will make him respond to the criminal's orders.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon get involved with a Croatian king and a werewolf-type who plots to control the King's country.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon again meet archfiend Dr. Loveless, who plans to take over arsenal and sub-treasury and become a dictator.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon Set out to recover the stolen U.S. Constitution from a man using it to bargain for control of border territory.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is ordered to block a Canadian revolutionary in his scheme to establish a personal empire by violence.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon upset a conspiracy to assassinate the President of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon find the evil Dr. Loveless' "corpse," then encounter a fictitious but deadly uncle.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott connects a homeowner's basement lighting system to one switch. Richard shares tips on air conditioning maintenance. The guys ask "What Is It?" And Roger shows how to rejuvenate a crabapple tree.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a broken window with a safer solution. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shows how to rotate a toilet. Roger teaches Kevin how to properly sharpen a chainsaw blade.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a watertight fire pit cover. Then Scott shows the evolution of fuses. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard heads to Missouri to upgrade and vent a bathroom sink.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom helps a homeowner install interior window trim. Richard shares some first time plumbing tips with Kevin. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Scott helps a homeowner wire an above ground pool safely.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replaces overgrown shrubs with an edible landscape. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shares some tips on snaking drains. Tom helps a homeowner replace some damaged pieces of vinyl siding.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a whole house ductless heating and cooling system. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Kevin shares tips on hearing protection. Tom helps a homeowner repair a sagging plaster ceiling.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin transforms an old backsplash. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard installs a new kitchen faucet. Tom shows the options of insulation materials: Spray foam, fiberglass, and blown-in cellulose.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom heads to West Virginia to help a homeowner replace broken sash cords. Roger shows a homeowner how to plant bulbs. And the guys play "What Is It" with special guest Doris Kearns Goodwin.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a basic poplar and plywood entry shelf. Scott wires basement outlets and lighting. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shares "dos and don'ts" of hooking up an icemaker.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott helps replaces an undersized ceiling fan with a more appropriate one. The guys ask "What Is It?" Later, Roger visits a bonsai nursery to learn the art of sculpting trees.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Meteorologist Jim Cantore discusses lightning and Roger sees a lightning protection system installed. The guys ask, "What Is It?" and Richard helps install a reverse osmosis drinking water filter.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Electrician Scott Caron heads to Cleveland to install some landscape lighting. Kevin, Tom, Richard, and Roger ask "What Is It?" Then Richard replaces a water main shutoff.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replaces a mailbox damaged by a snowplow. Kevin teaches window anatomy. Tom reuses an old door in a new opening. The guys ask, "What Is It?" and Richard shows how to keep a toilet from rocking.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin discuss kitchen islands. Richard helps quiet a noisy baseboard heat. The guys ask, "What Is It?" and Scott adds light to a kitchen with three new recessed cans.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger plants an indoor tropical garden. The ask "What Is It?" and Richard shows how to change the temperature on water heaters. Then Tom and Kevin built an American flag out of reclaimed wood.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Electrician Scott Caron helps a homeowner install an electric vehicle charger next to his house. The guys ask, "What Is It?" Then, Richard helps a homeowner install a new kitchen sink and faucet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows lengths to consider when mowing the lawn. Richard installs an energy-saving thermostat run by a smartphone app. The guys ask, "What Is It?" and Ross installs a photovoltaic solar array.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Host Kevin O'Connor, general contractor Tom Silva, plumbing and heating expert Richard Trethewey, landscape contractor Roger Cook and guest experts guide viewers through home improvement techniques by making house calls all over America.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Ken Norton 2
programme.desc: On September 10th, 1973 Muhammad Ali and Ken Norton participated in their second meeting at the Forum in Inglewood, CA. They fought for the North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight title with Ali winning this time with split decision.

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles
programme.desc: On March 5th, 1994 James Toney and Tim Littles fought at the Olympic Auditorium in Los Angeles for IBF World Super middleweight titles resulting in a technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Michael Nunn
programme.desc: On May 10th, 1991 James Toney fought Michael Nunn at the John O'Donnell Stadium in Davenport for IBF World middleweight titles with the bout ending in round 11 by technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 13th, 1993 James Toney faced Iran Barkley in a thrilling bout at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for IBF World Super middleweight title with Toney securing the title and victory.

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi
programme.desc: On February 8th, 1992 James Toney faced Dave Tiberi for the IBF World Middleweight at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic City with a point deducted from Tiberi for a low blow the bout ended in a split decision win for Toney.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 1
programme.desc: On June 6th, 1988 Iran Barkley faces Thomas Hearns for the first time at the Las Vegas Hilton Center they battle for the WBC World Middleweight title with the bout lasting 3 rounds resulting in a victory for Barkley.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 2
programme.desc: On March 20th, 1992 Iran Barkley and Thomas Hearns fought for a second time at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for WBA World Light heavyweight title, the fight resulted in a split decision win for Barkley.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Adam Lopez
programme.desc: On June 19th, 2021 Issac Dogboe faced Adam Lopez in a 10 round bout for the North American Boxing Federation Featherweight title that ended in a majority decision victory for Dogboe.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Jessie Magdaleno
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2018, Isaac Dogboe and Jessie Magdaleno fought at the Liacouras Center in Philadelphia. With Dogboe going down in round one and Magdaleno down in round five and twice in round 11, Dogboe took the victory.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Carl Frampton
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2021 Jamel Herring fought Carl Frampton for WBO World Super Featherweight title in a 12 round bout at the Caesars Palace Dubai resulting in a technical knockout victory in the sixth round for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Masayuki Ito
programme.desc: On May 25th, 2019 Jamel Herring and Masayuki Ito battled for the WBO super featherweight title in a 12 round bout at Osceola Heritage Park in Kissimmee, Fl. That ended in a unanimous decision victory for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: On October 23rd, 2021, Shakur Stevenson fought Jamel Herring for the WBO World Super Featherweight Title at State Farm Arena in Atlanta. A much quicker Shakur dominated from the start, finishing Herring in the tenth round.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 1
programme.desc: On December 13th, 1991 James Toney and Mike McCallum fought eachother for the first time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City for IBF World Middleweight title ending in a draw.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 2
programme.desc: On August 29th, 1992, James Toney rematched Mike McCallum for the IBF Middleweight Title in Reno. This time, Toney came out on top via a majority decision in which many believed the scorecards were too lopsided in favor of Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 3
programme.desc: On February 22nd, 1997 James Toney and Mike McCallum face each other for the final time at the Mohegan Sun Casino in Uncasville in a strong bout that lasted 12 rounds ending in a victory for Toney.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime, Bumblebee, Jazz and the others in the battle to stop them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one - the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. With Cybertron now in orbit, the Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters. A small Autobot team heads to Cybertron to stop Megatron, while the rest of the Autobots try to protect Earth. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons’ hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Deep in the “Demon Swamp” on the island of Bali, large robotic insects are eating everything in their path and terrorizing the islanders. Megatron realizes they are an ancient breed of Decepticons, and forms an alliance with these powerful Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Spike is wounded and knocked unconscious in a Decepticon attack, Sparkplug and Wheeljack reluctantly transfer his consciousness into their experimental robot, Autobot X, to save him.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: With Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, any object in motion can be frozen. Although it may prove valuable in the fight against evil, it may also prove too dangerous to exist…especially once Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, can freeze any object in motion. It could be a valuable tool in the Autobot's fight against evil, but it may also prove to be too dangerous to exist,especially after Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Accused of treason, Mirage sets out on his own to stop the Decepticons and Insecticons, as well as prove himself innocent. But when his plan to play the two evil forces against each other fails, a chain of events is set off where no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots agree to protect the female ninja robot Nightbird, the most advanced human-made robot ever constructed. But when Megatron gets his hands on Nightbird and reprograms her, it's the Autobots who'll need protecting!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Princess Aussie's singles match against WOW World Champion Abilene Maverick as the Australian tries to prove that she'll never give up chasing her dream.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four are incensed to find out that because of their constant attacks on The Mother Truckers, David McLane has granted Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag a Main Event tag team match against Penelope Pink and Vickie Lynn McCoy.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal have a new look, but it's make or break for The All American Girls as they call their shot against them for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The VIP Abilene Maverick is firmly in The Beast's crosshairs as The Beast finally gets the rematch she's been waiting on for weeks, and a chance to reclaim the WOW World Championship that she never lost.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast demands justice after taking a loss in the WOW World Championship Match in the last episode of WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: To prove that the members of Team Spirit are more than just benchwarmers, Ariel Sky challenges Top Tier to face Team Spirit head on in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the truth about Abilene Maverick's injury is revealed, David McLane reminds her of her obligation to defend The WOW World Championship Title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the sun beating down on the ice, the road is melting at an accelerating rate. This means that it's all hands on deck for the demobilization of the drilling sites at Langley and Mallik, which must be broken down.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Rising temperatures are melting away the ice road, making it a dash to the finish line for the crew breaking down the Langely site. Every last piece of equipment must be transported down the ice to Inuvik before the Arctic waters reclaim the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Warming temperatures are causing overflows all over the ice road, and with water rushing through cracks in the ice, hauling loads just got a lot more dangerous. Jody and Brett take on the challenge of removing the 66-ton derrick from the Langley site.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Logging country is turned upside down when one of the mountain's best bows out. At Papac Alaska, the men suffer under the reign of a new yarder operator.

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: In the Meltdown finale, Mike escapes the bear-ridden Kodiak interior on foot; Jake runs a lion on foreign ground; Josh does battle with a prairie dog colony; Jason takes his kids' outdoor survival lessons to new extremes.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: The Mountains of North America haunt the imagination, masking a danger few are willing to confront. Despite the challenges, some choose to live this way.

programme.title: Mountain Men
